phases.name: Victor Lifecycle and Forecast Foundation
phases.objective: Model Victor as a separate governed project inside Builder and define the forecasting signals for remaining autonomy work.

tasks.title: Model Victor project lifecycle from concept to completion
tasks.description: Define the stages Builder should use to track Victor work without collapsing it into Builder infrastructure work.
acceptance: Victor lifecycle stages are explicit and separate from Builder Console infrastructure stages.

tasks.title: Define Victor remaining-effort forecast signals
tasks.description: Specify confidence, blockers, dependencies, and effort-band inputs for forecasting Victor progress.
acceptance: Victor forecast inputs are evidence-backed and separate from generic automation activity.

tasks.title: Record Builder dependencies that gate Victor autonomy promotion
tasks.description: Capture which Builder capabilities must mature before Victor can safely escalate autonomy.
acceptance: Victor dependencies on Builder infrastructure are explicit and governable.

phases.name: Unattended Execute Promotion Review
phases.objective: Define the execute-mode promotion bar for Victor and tie unattended operation to explicit evidence, fallback, and revocation rules.

tasks.title: Define Victor unattended execute-mode promotion criteria
tasks.description: Turn the current dry-run soak and dependency gates into explicit promotion criteria for unattended write-capable heartbeat operation.
acceptance: Execute-mode promotion criteria are explicit, governed, and stricter than dry-run soak success alone.

tasks.title: Review 30m dry-run soak evidence against promotion gate
tasks.description: Compare the unattended 30m dry-run audit trail against the execute-mode promotion criteria before any autonomy increase.
acceptance: Dry-run soak evidence is reviewed against the gate and any missing proof is explicit.

tasks.title: Record unattended execute fallback and revocation triggers
tasks.description: Capture the kill conditions, fallback rules, and revocation criteria that should force Victor out of unattended execute mode.
acceptance: Execute-mode fallback and revocation triggers are explicit and Builder-visible.

phases.name: Bounded Unattended Execute Pilot
phases.objective: Run the first bounded unattended execute window, review its evidence, and decide whether Victor has earned any wider autonomy.

tasks.title: Run bounded unattended 30m execute pilot
tasks.description: Run Victor in unattended execute mode at the 30-minute baseline with explicit kill-switch, tick, and runtime limits.
acceptance: Unattended execute pilot runs within the bounded action budget and leaves a reviewable verification packet.

tasks.title: Review unattended execute verification packet
tasks.description: Inspect the verification-grade report after the unattended execute pilot and classify any drift, block, or revocation signals.
acceptance: Observed, inferred, and unverified claims are reviewed before any autonomy expansion decision.

tasks.title: Define post-pilot autonomy expansion rule
tasks.description: Decide what evidence would be required before Victor gains broader unattended scope, faster cadence, or wider project coverage.
acceptance: Autonomy expansion remains evidence-gated and does not self-authorize from a single successful pilot.
